title: Insert Delete GetRandom O(1)
pattern: Design â€” Array + Hashmap Index Tracking
coreIdea: Design a structure supporting O(1) insert, delete, and get-random-element, by combining an array (for O(1) random access) with a hashmap tracking each value's index in the array, and using a swap-with-last-then-pop trick for O(1) deletion.
recognitionCues: requires O(1) for insert, delete, AND random access all together
array alone gives O(1) random access but O(n) delete; hashmap alone gives O(1) delete but no random access â€” combining both is the key insight
approach: Maintain an array of values and a hashmap from value to its index in the array. Insert: append to array, record index in hashmap. Delete: swap the target element with the last array element, update the swapped element's index in hashmap, pop the last element, remove target from hashmap. GetRandom: return array[random index].
